column1: # /Worksheet Global Default Other International Negative Parens|Sign —
# affects how negative Currency and Comma values display. Default is
# Sign (leading minus). Parens wraps the magnitude in `(…)`.
# Widen column A so parens-wrapped negatives fit without overflowing.
# /WGDOIN P — Parens style. Negative now wraps in `(...)`.
# /WGDOIN S — Sign style restores the minus prefix.
